title: Debate verdict
description: Mirror of debate.sdk.schemas.Verdict + the Stage 9 Judge.validate_verdict contract. The Judge MUST return JSON shaped exactly like this; ties are forbidden, scores are bounded 0..100, and at least 3 reasons are required.

winner.description: Side that won the debate. Tie is forbidden by protocol; the Judge must always pick a side. If the LLM produces a tie, the Stage 9 verdict pipeline retries once and then falls back to a deterministic tie-break.

scores.description: Cumulative scores per side, derived from per-turn Judge scoring. Bounded 0..100 to keep transcripts well-formed.

reasons.description: Free-form rationale strings supporting the winner. The Judge requires at least 3 (MIN_VERDICT_REASONS); each must be a non-empty trimmed string.
